_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of use cases related to collaboration and content synchronization across platforms (e.g., Mobile, PC, Cloud).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of cloud data platform services across major providers, including storage, compute, streaming, and orchestration capabilities and their architectural implications.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.505), OP-K-010 (OP, cosine: 0.490).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.662). Shared vocabulary: [across, cloud, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [cases, collaboration, content, mobile, pc, platforms] vs WIDAI-only terms [architectural, capabilities, compute, data, implications, major] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.876, R=0.886). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of use cases related to collaboration and content synchronization acro" and "Knowledge of cloud data platform services across major providers, including stor" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.521 < STS 0.662 (gap -0.140). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [cases, collaboration, content] and [architectural, capabilities, compute] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.1%. Shared tokens: [across, cloud, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [cases, collaboration, content, mobile, pc, platforms]. WIDAI-only: [architectural, capabilities, compute, data, implications, major].
